hooks.command: claude --print --allowedTools 'Bash,Read,Edit' 'Check if OpenSpec tasks need to be updated before this PR. Steps: 1) run git diff main...HEAD --name-only to see changed files 2) find openspec/changes -name tasks.md -not -path */archive/* 3) read each tasks.md and identify incomplete tasks (- [ ]) 4) for each incomplete task check if changed files indicate implementation is done 5) if tasks should be marked complete edit tasks.md (- [ ] to - [x]) 6) if changes were made run: git add openspec/ && git commit -m "chore(openspec): mark completed tasks before PR" 7) report what was updated or confirm already up to date. Be conservative: only mark complete if clearly implemented.' 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: 檢查 OpenSpec 實作進度...
